savedquery.name: Active Recipients
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_allowancerecord"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_personnelNumber" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" /> <attribute name="va_allowanceLevel" /> <attribute name="va_monthlyAllowanceAmount" /> <attribute name="va_isElectricVehicle" /> <attribute name="va_effectiveDate" /> <attribute name="va_nextRenewalDue" /> <attribute name="va_status" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_status" operator="eq" value="720000400" /> </filter> <order attribute="va_applicantName" descending="false" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_allowancerecordid"> <cell name="va_applicantName" width="160" /> <cell name="va_personnelNumber" width="100" /> <cell name="va_applicantCompany" width="130" /> <cell name="va_allowanceLevel" width="80" /> <cell name="va_monthlyAllowanceAmount" width="110" /> <cell name="va_isElectricVehicle" width="60" /> <cell name="va_effectiveDate" width="110" /> <cell name="va_nextRenewalDue" width="110" /> </row> </grid>

savedquery.name: Terminated This Year
savedquery.description: Allowance records terminated in the current calendar year
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_allowancerecord"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_personnelNumber" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" /> <attribute name="va_allowanceLevel" /> <attribute name="va_terminationType" /> <attribute name="va_terminationDate" /> <attribute name="va_terminationReason" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_status" operator="eq" value="720000402" /> <condition attribute="va_terminationDate" operator="this-year" /> </filter> <order attribute="va_terminationDate" descending="true" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_allowancerecordid"> <cell name="va_applicantName" width="160" /> <cell name="va_personnelNumber" width="100" /> <cell name="va_applicantCompany" width="130" /> <cell name="va_allowanceLevel" width="80" /> <cell name="va_terminationType" width="160" /> <cell name="va_terminationDate" width="110" /> <cell name="va_terminationReason" width="250" /> </row> </grid>
